name: Banana Bread#2
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the sifted flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
2. In a separate bowl, whisk together the egg, mashed bananas, and lemon juice (if using).
3. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture, stirring until just combined.
4. Fold in the nuts if desired.
5. Pour the batter into a greased 9x5 inch loaf pan.
6. Bake at 350°F for 45 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
7. Allow the bread to cool before serving.
